Package com.rays.common

Class BaseDTO

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rays.common.BaseDTO
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    DropdownList
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    AttachmentDTO, CollegeDTO, ContactDTO, CourseDTO, FacultyDTO, MarksheetDTO, RoleDTO, StudentDTO, SubjectDTO, TimeTableDTO, UserDTO
    @MappedSuperclass
public abstract class BaseDTO
extends java.lang.Object
implements DropdownList
    Base Data Transfer Object class that provides common fields and functionality for all DTOs in the application. This class serves as a superclass for all entity DTOs and implements the DropdownList interface.

    This class is annotated with MappedSuperclass to indicate that it is a mapped superclass whose mapping information is applied to entities that inherit from it.

    Author:
    sanjana gangrade

      Gets the login ID of the user who created the record.

      Gets the creation timestamp of the record.

      Gets the ID of the record.

      Gets the key value for dropdown display.
      abstract java.lang.String getLabel()
      Gets the display label for this DTO.
      java.lang.String getModifiedBy()
      Gets the login ID of the user who last modified the record.
      java.sql.Timestamp getModifiedDatetime()
      Gets the last modification timestamp of the record.

      Gets the table name associated with this DTO.
      abstract java.lang.String getUniqueKey()
      Gets the unique key attribute name for this DTO.

      Gets the value of the unique key attribute for this DTO.

      Sets the login ID of the user who last modified the record.

    • Method Detail

      • getUniqueKey

        public abstract java.lang.String getUniqueKey()
        Gets the unique key attribute name for this DTO. Used to identify which field serves as the unique constraint.
        Returns:
        the name of the unique key attribute

      • getUniqueValue

        public abstract java.lang.String getUniqueValue()
        Gets the value of the unique key attribute for this DTO. Used to check uniqueness during save/update operations.
        Returns:
        the value of the unique key attribute

      • getLabel

        public abstract java.lang.String getLabel()
        Gets the display label for this DTO. Used for showing meaningful names in error messages and UI.
        Returns:
        the display label

      • getTableName

        public abstract java.lang.String getTableName()
        Gets the table name associated with this DTO. Used for generating meaningful success messages.
        Returns:
        the table name

      • getId

        public java.lang.Long getId()
        Gets the ID of the record.
        Returns:
        the primary key ID

      • setId

        public void setId​(java.lang.Long id)
        Sets the ID of the record.
        Parameters:
        id - the primary key ID to set

      • getCreatedBy

        public java.lang.String getCreatedBy()
        Gets the login ID of the user who created the record.
        Returns:
        the created by login ID

      • setCreatedBy

        public void setCreatedBy​(java.lang.String createdBy)
        Sets the login ID of the user who created the record.
        Parameters:
        createdBy - the created by login ID to set

      • getModifiedBy

        public java.lang.String getModifiedBy()
        Gets the login ID of the user who last modified the record.
        Returns:
        the modified by login ID

      • setModifiedBy

        public void setModifiedBy​(java.lang.String modifiedBy)
        Sets the login ID of the user who last modified the record.
        Parameters:

      • getCreatedDatetime

        public java.sql.Timestamp getCreatedDatetime()
        Gets the creation timestamp of the record.
        Returns:
        the created datetime

      • setCreatedDatetime

        public void setCreatedDatetime​(java.sql.Timestamp createdDatetime)
        Sets the creation timestamp of the record.
        Parameters:
        createdDatetime - the created datetime to set

      • getModifiedDatetime

        public java.sql.Timestamp getModifiedDatetime()
        Gets the last modification timestamp of the record.
        Returns:
        the modified datetime

      • setModifiedDatetime

        public void setModifiedDatetime​(java.sql.Timestamp modifiedDatetime)
        Sets the last modification timestamp of the record.
        Parameters:
        modifiedDatetime - the modified datetime to set

      • getKey

        public java.lang.String getKey()
        Gets the key value for dropdown display. Implements the DropdownList.getKey() method.
        Specified by:
        getKey in interface DropdownList
        Returns:
        the ID as a string to be used as dropdown option key
